codeReview.summary: The refactor meets the structural goals (deploy.go reduced to 400 lines, core logic split into focused helpers/files) and preserves the main reconcile flow. I found one high-confidence non-blocking correctness/maintainability regression in stale-instance cleanup error handling.

issues.description: resetStaleInstance now performs an extra DeploymentFirstByID lookup and silently ignores lookup failure before volume detach. In the pre-refactor flow, dep.ProjectID was already available from the caller and detach was attempted unconditionally. If this lookup fails, detachProjectVolumeIfAttached is skipped, which can leave volume attachment state stale. This is a behavior change in an error path and violates the mission's 'structural only' and no-silent-error intent.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit 7f92f23 diff, transcript skeleton, and refactor-worker skill. Feature is functionally acceptable overall and satisfies split targets; one non-blocking error-path regression was identified in resetStaleInstance volume-detach handling.
